name: Morpho, Inc.
summary: Morpho, Inc. engages in the research, development, and licensing of image processing technologies in Japan. It offers image and motion stabilization; AI inference software; video processing software package; artificial bokeh effect; flash reduction; noise reduction; HDR and DR-corrected image generation; panorama image generation; high-speed video generation; visual SLAM; and motion vector and face detection. The company also provides imaging effect filters library; rectangle object detection and extraction; image classification and super resolution; focus-adjustable image generation; frame interpolator; and posture estimation technologies. Its solutions are embedded in camera phones, digital cameras, and other mobile devices. Morpho, Inc. was founded in 2004 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
